hero.subtitle: At VIPAX, we efficiently manage any passenger assistance before, during and after the operation. We handle transportation, accommodation and catering, providing a comprehensive and effective solution that guarantees well-being and minimizes operational impact for the airline in compliance with European Regulation 261/2004.

services.subtitle: At VIPAX we efficiently manage any passenger assistance, providing a comprehensive solution that guarantees well-being and minimizes operational impact.

passengerManagement.title: Comprehensive passenger management
passengerManagement.desc: We specialize in assisting passengers affected by any type of operational incident: overbooking, flight cancellations, missed connections and flight diversions.

hotelReservations.title: Hotel reservations
hotelReservations.desc: Complete hotel reservation management service for affected flight passengers, crew members, airline employees and organized groups.

groundTransport.title: Ground transportation
groundTransport.desc: Efficient ground transportation solutions adapted to each situation, from flight cancellations to corporate events with a wide network of certified providers.

corporateEvents.title: Corporate events
corporateEvents.desc: Organization of meetings, conferences, conventions, incentive trips and team buildings. Venue management, catering, technology and on-site coordination.

step1.title: Contact us
step1.desc: Call us or send a message. Our team is available 24/7 to handle any incident immediately.

step2.title: We manage the solution
step2.desc: We coordinate accommodation, transportation and assistance immediately. We handle everything with a wide network of certified providers.

step3.title: Guaranteed resolution
step3.desc: The passenger receives comprehensive care. We guarantee quick solutions and the best alternative for each situation.

testimonial1.text: VIPAX transformed our incident management. They resolved a mass cancellation of 200 passengers in less than 4 hours. Their professionalism is exceptional.
testimonial1.author: María García

testimonial2.text: The hotel and transportation coordination is impeccable. We have been working with them for 3 years and our passenger satisfaction has improved significantly.
testimonial2.author: Carlos Ruiz

testimonial3.text: When we had an emergency with 150 stranded crew members, VIPAX found solutions in minutes. Their hotel and transportation network is impressive.
testimonial3.author: Ana Martínez

calculator.title: Compensation Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Check if you are entitled to compensation under European Regulation 261/2004
calculator.notEligible: Sorry, you do not meet the requirements for compensation.
calculator.info: Compensation varies depending on flight distance and delay time. This calculation is for guidance only.
calculator.infoTitle: When are you entitled to compensation?
calculator.infoText1: Under European Regulation 261/2004, air passengers are entitled to compensation in case of flight cancellation, delay of more than 3 hours, or denied boarding due to overbooking.
calculator.infoText2: The compensation amount depends on the flight distance and is not based on the ticket price. It is a right that all airlines must comply with.
calculator.infoText3: If you think you may be entitled to compensation, use our calculator or contact us for personalized advice.

rules.r1: Flight cancellation without 14 days advance notice
rules.r2: Delay of more than 3 hours at final destination
rules.r4: Missed connection due to delay of first flight

calculator.title: Compensation Calculator - VIPAX
calculator.description: Calculate if you are entitled to compensation for flight cancellation or delay under European Regulation 261/2004.
